items.claim: Ethan Ewing has the ability to string punches together better than Farid Basharat.
items.quote: Ewing to steal big moments in the fight with more ability to string punches together.

items.claim: Ethan Ewing has a capable get-up game from the bottom position.
items.quote: He's shown good get-up game outside of the UFC

items.claim: Ethan Ewing's boxing skillset is superior to Farid Basharat's technical kickboxing range.
items.quote: I think that the boxing skillset should win against the technical kickboxing range that Basharat brings to the fight

items.claim: Farid Basharat lacks significant knockout ability.
items.quote: If Basharat had more knockout ability, if we had some KOs and you know, if he was ripping some close-range elbows and slimming people out, there might be a push more towards him

items.claim: Ethan Ewing can land better punches than Matsumoto did against Farid Basharat.
items.quote: I think Ewing can land better punches and Ewing can fend off takedowns better than Matsumoto did.

items.claim: Ethan Ewing has better takedown defense than Matsumoto did.
items.quote: Ewing can fend off takedowns better than Matsumoto did.

items.claim: Damian Pinas possesses elite, fight-ending knockout power.
items.quote: his knockout ability is an absolute gift. He seems to just have the touch of death

items.claim: Cesar Almeida is susceptible to being caught by straight punches.
items.quote: I feel like Saez Almeida gets caught with straight rights in MMA. You know, we've seen him drop before with a straight.

items.claim: Damian Pinas has a significant reach advantage with a 79.5-inch reach at 6'1".
items.quote: freaky long reach, 6'1 with a 79 and 1/2 inch reach.

items.claim: Damian Pinas has a speed advantage over Cesar Almeida.
items.quote: Should have a bit of a speed advantage, too.
